name: MCP Analytics Server (Embedded Layers)
what_it_does: MCP Analytics server providing searchable tools and reports with interactive HTML visualization capabilities. Enables AI agents to query analytics data and generate visual HTML reports — combining data retrieval with presentation-ready output for analytics workflows.
use_cases: Generating interactive HTML analytics reports from data analysis agents
Querying analytics tools and retrieving business metrics for reporting agents
Creating visual data presentations from AI-driven business intelligence agents
Building analytics automation workflows with HTML output for dashboards
not_for: Real-time dashboards requiring live data streaming
Enterprise BI platforms requiring complex access controls
Large-scale data warehouse analytics (optimized for targeted reports)
best_when: A data analyst or business team wants AI agents to query analytics data and generate formatted HTML reports — producing visually useful outputs beyond plain text.
avoid_when: You need a full BI platform. Also: interactive HTML reports may not render in all MCP client environments — verify client can display rich HTML output.

auth.notes: Authentication varies by analytics data source connection. Review Embedded Layers documentation for connector-specific auth requirements.

pricing.notes: Pricing not publicly documented. Check embeddedlayers.com for access.

known_agent_gotchas: HTML output requires MCP client capable of rendering rich HTML — not all clients support this
Analytics data may include sensitive business metrics — restrict agent access accordingly
Report generation latency can be high for complex queries
Emerging service with limited community adoption and documentation
Verify data connector compatibility with your analytics stack before deployment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Business analytics data may be sensitive. HTML output with embedded data. Data connector credentials must be secured. Emerging platform with unverified security posture.

security_score_components.security_notes: Analytics data sensitivity varies by source. Connector credentials must be secured. HTML output may embed sensitive data. Emerging platform.
